columns.dc:description: The name of the organisation to which the counter fraud activity relates.
A Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) which identifies the organisation.
Date at which the information provided is true, in the ISO international date format YYYY-MM-DD.
The accounting period to which the data applies, in the format YYYY/YY.
Proportion of valid and undisputed invoices paid within 30 days in accordance with Regulation 113(7) of the Public Contracts Regulations 2015 - Payment Performance Contracting.
The amount of interest in GBP paid to suppliers due to a breach of the requirement in Regulation 113(7) of the Public Contracts Regulations 2015 - Payment Performance Contracting.

The total amount of interest in GBP that the contracting authority was liable to (whether or not paid and whether under any statutory or other requirement), due to a breach of Regulation 113(7) of the Public Contracts Regulations 2015 - Payment Performance Contracting.
Number of invoices not paid within 30 days (NOTE: No mandatory requirement to publish but included for transparency, not all invoices paid over 30 days have been checked for disputes).
